entities.description: Upland rice cultivars used in the study

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: Essential nutrient P used for plant nutrition

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: Region where upland rice production is focused

entities.name: IVORY COAST
entities.description: Country where the field experiment was conducted

entities.name: HUMID FOREST ZONE
entities.description: Ecological zone in Ivory Coast where the study took place

entities.name: ULTISOL
entities.description: Type of soil characterized by a range of extractable phosphorus

entities.name: RAINFED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions under which the field experiment was conducted

entities.name: PLANT TISSUE TEST
entities.description: Test used to calibrate phosphorus levels in plant tissues

entities.name: FIELD EXPERIMENT
entities.description: Research method used to establish relationships between P content and yield

entities.name: PLANT PHOSPHORUS CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of phosphorus in the whole rice plant tops

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced by the rice cultivars

entities.name: RELATIVE GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: Grain yield expressed as a percentage relative to a maximum

entities.name: TOTAL PHOSPHORUS UPTAKE
entities.description: The total amount of phosphorus absorbed by the plant biomass

entities.name: STRAW YIELD
entities.description: The amount of straw produced by the rice cultivars

entities.name: TILLERING STAGE
entities.description: The specific growth stage of rice when P content was measured

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The overall output of the crop to be improved

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS NUTRITION
entities.description: The process of providing phosphorus to improve crop production
